action.proof_term:
intro n k₁ k₂ hk₁k₂ hk₂n
apply Nat.dvd_antisymm
· apply Nat.dvd_gcd
  · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
  · have h := Nat.dvd_sub
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_left (n - k₁) (n - k₂))
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_right (n - k₁) (n - k₂))
    have hgap : (n - k₁) - (n - k₂) = k₂ - k₁ := by omega
    rwa [hgap] at h
· apply Nat.dvd_gcd
  · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
  · have h := Nat.dvd_sub
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_left (n - k₁) (k₂ - k₁))
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_right (n - k₁) (k₂ - k₁))
    have hshift : (n - k₁) - (k₂ - k₁) = n - k₂ := by omega
    rwa [hshift] at h

intro n k₁ k₂ hk₁k₂ hk₂n
apply Nat.dvd_antisymm
· apply Nat.dvd_gcd
  · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
  · have h := Nat.dvd_sub
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_left (n - k₁) (n - k₂))
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_right (n - k₁) (n - k₂))
    have hgap : (n - k₁) - (n - k₂) = k₂ - k₁ := by omega
    rwa [hgap] at h
· apply Nat.dvd_gcd
  · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
  · have h := Nat.dvd_sub
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_left (n - k₁) (k₂ - k₁))
      (Nat.gcd_dvd_right (n - k₁) (k₂ - k₁))
    have hshift : (n - k₁) - (k₂ - k₁) = n - k₂ := by omega
    rwa [hshift] at h

info.lean_statement:
∀ n k₁ k₂ : ℕ, k₁ ≤ k₂ → k₂ < n →
  Nat.gcd (n - k₁) (n - k₂) = Nat.gcd (n - k₁) (k₂ - k₁)

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
